rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees within annex agree blocks
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features, not implementation-specific subcomponents
Ensure type declarations in AGREE match the actual AADL types (int, real, bool)
Generate guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs without using internal subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq for equation declarations and const for constant declarations with proper type annotations
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponent ports in component type annexes
Do not include AADL property names as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed features
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
